positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a serene cosmic creature—a bioluminescent, gentle manta ray soaring through a stylized nebula of deep indigo, violet, and teal. The manta ray should have clean, elegant curves and dramatic underbelly glow, casting strong contrast silhouettes against the cosmic background. Geometric celestial elements, star trails, and abstract planetary orbits frame the scene. Inspired by art deco futurism and contemporary psychedelic patterns. High contrast, volumetric lighting, clean linework, suitable for screen printing on a dark fabric. Central composition, symmetrical balance, intricate detail.
